projects.title: Pharmacy Billing & Inventory System
projects.description: Full-stack web application designed for real-time pharmacy operations. Supports batch-wise inventory tracking, GST-compliant billing, and thermal invoice generation. Includes fuzzy medicine search, stock validation, expiry checks, and role-based access control.

projects.title: Healthcare Data System
projects.description: Manages patient records and billing, optimizing data for quick access and analysis. Ensures data integrity, secure access, and streamlines healthcare operations.

projects.title: Text to Image Generator
projects.description: Creates a text-to-image generator using machine learning models to convert textual descriptions into corresponding visuals.

projects.title: Automated Email Sender
projects.description: Python tool that automates sending personalized or bulk emails using smtplib and email. Supports attachments, customizable messages, and CSV integration for recipient data.

internships.title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
internships.description: Worked on real-world AI projects involving data preprocessing, machine learning models, and NLP systems. Utilized tools like Python, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn to build and optimize solutions. Conducted data analysis and collaborated with a team to develop and deploy AI models. Presented project outcomes and insights to mentors, showcasing active implementation strategies.
